props.name: onMenuClick
props.description: Callback fired whenever the menu toggle changes; receives open state.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional class names for the root nav wrapper.

props.name: style
props.description: Inline styles applied to the root nav wrapper.

props.name: menuAriaLabel
props.description: Accessible aria-label for the toggle button.

props.name: menuBg
props.description: Background color for the logo & toggle bubbles and base pill background.

props.name: menuContentColor
props.description: Color for the menu icon lines and default pill text.

props.name: useFixedPosition
props.description: If true positions the menu with fixed instead of absolute (follows viewport).

props.name: items
props.description: Custom menu items; each = { label, href, ariaLabel?, rotation?, hoverStyles?: { bgColor?, textColor? } }.

props.name: animationEase
props.description: GSAP ease string used for bubble scale-in animation.

props.name: animationDuration
props.description: Duration (s) for each bubble & label animation.

props.name: staggerDelay
props.description: Base stagger (s) between bubble animations (with slight random variance).
